# Mujtaba Shahid Portfolio

Official site: https://mujii.dev/

Mujtaba Shahid is a cybersecurity and secure software development professional based in Doha, Qatar. His work focuses on penetration testing, zero-trust architecture, secure web systems, and AI-agent security.

Key sections:

- Profile
- Work
- Trajectory
- Arsenal
- Dossier
- Contact

Key focus areas:

- Cybersecurity
- Secure software development
- Web application security
- AI-agent security
- Zero-trust systems
- Penetration testing
- Frontend and full-stack development

Primary project themes:

- Decentralized zero-trust proxy for MCP and AI agents
- Secure web systems
- University and startup software projects
- Security-focused application development

Contact:

Use the contact links on https://mujii.dev/
